arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim press conference live Manchester United injury updates ahead of Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Live updates from Man United head coach Ruben Amorim's pre-match press conference ahead of Tuesday night's trip to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Amorim ends two Man Utd careers with €100m Bruno Fernandes decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid emerged as €100 million contenders to sign Bruno Fernandes from Manchester United in a stunning transfer report on Sunday only to be knocked swiftly back by head coach Ruben Amorim. While this says a great deal about how much Bruno is admired at Old Trafford – and as the Premier League’s best attacking midfielder this season, according to SciSports, he deserves this status – it also casts further doubt on the future of Kobbie Mainoo and Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face £20m Marcus Rashford bill after Unai Emery reveals transfer stance
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is enjoying a positive loan spell at Aston Villa after scoring twice and assisting four under Unai Emery, who is yet to confirm whether the club will sign him permanently this summer

arts.ttl: Report: Man United get significant Victor Osimhen boost
arts.sum: Napoli are already on the lookout for a replacement for Victor Osimhen, according to reports. Almost every top Premier League club, aside from Manchester City, is on the hunt for a reliable centre-forward. Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester United, and Liverpool are all looking to strengthen their attacking options. arts.ttl: Man United players had to stop David Beckham from coming at me – he was furious
arts.sum: David Beckham lost his cool in the Manchester United dressing room and had to be held back by his Red Devils team-mates in his final months at the club

arts.ttl: WhoScored's FA Cup Team of the Round: Marcus Rashford, Eberechi Eze, Ola Aina
arts.sum: Aston Villa star Marcus Rashford is the FA Cup Player of the Round following his Player of the Match showing at Preston on Sunday. Rashford is one of four Villa stars to make an XI also featuring repr...

arts.ttl: Ex-Man United star is reduced to tears after being forced off with an injury just FIVE minutes into his return to action
arts.sum: A former Manchester United midfielder could not hold back the tears after suffering another setback just five minutes into his return from injury.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's XI next season without Bruno Fernandes and with four new signings
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is set to oversee a major overhaul at Manchester United this summer, with the Red Devils boss looking to put his own stamp on an underperforming squad

arts.ttl: Arsenal join Man United, Liverpool 'in the mix' for £66m Alexander Isak alternative ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly considering a summer swoop for Alexander Isak alternative Hugo Ekitike, with Manchester United and Liverpool also keen on the Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Club chief confirms interest in signing Man Utd midfielder
arts.sum: Ajax confirm their interest in signing Christian Eriksen when his Man Utd contract expires.
